summary: GPS location navbar kodi tubdan soddalashtirildi. tryNativeBridge/tryBrowserGeo/isFlutter tekshiruvlari olib tashlandi. Endi: window.addEventListener('vijdon_location') — Flutter har 15s da yuboradi, darhol gotCoords chaqiriladi. 6 soniya timeout: agar Flutter event kelmasa (oddiy brauzerda) — navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition enableHighAccuracy:false bilan BITTA marta chaqiriladi. watchPosition yo'q, alert yo'q, ruxsat so'rov yo'q Flutter ilovada.
current_status: GPS navbar tozalandi. Flutter APK qayta build kerak. Web tomoni tayyor.
